name: Pesto Tomato and Mozzarella Focaccia
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread pesto over the focaccia.
2. Arrange tomato slices over the pesto.
3. Top with cheese slices.
4. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
5. Place on a baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit until the cheese melts and the bread is hot, 6 to 10 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
